guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep the repository positioned as an AI framework template.

guidelinesCompliance.evidence: The work only hardened gates, tests, and generated baselines.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not change runtime behavior outside the remaining gates under review.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Only governance, coverage, and supply-chain controls were modified.

risk.detail: Gate hardening and terminology cleanup are complete; the remaining step is verification record finalization.

reviewReadiness.reason: All code changes and quality gates are complete; remaining work is final verification recording.

overclaimPrevention: Do not report completion for checks or behavior that were not verified.
